=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/globalErrorInEffectFailure_preview.ts(5,36): warning TS377023: Global 'Error' loses type safety as untagged errors merge together in the Effect failure channel. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property. effect(globalErrorInEffectFailure)


==== /.src/globalErrorInEffectFailure_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics globalErrorInEffectFailure:warning
    import { Effect } from "effect"
    
    export const preview = Effect.fail(new Error("boom"))
                                       ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377023: Global 'Error' loses type safety as untagged errors merge together in the Effect failure channel. Consider using a tagged error and optionally wrapping the original in a 'cause' property. effect(globalErrorInEffectFailure)
